query:
DELETE t1 FROM students t1
INNER JOIN students t2 
WHERE t1.id < t2.id 
AND t1.fullName = t2.fullName 
AND t1.grade = t2.grade 
AND t1.section = t2.section;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35xPkBa73Yuiy4A.root --database kcQuJzmxhkjxjyE5pHTEwG --execute DELETE t1 FROM students t1
INNER JOIN students t2 
WHERE t1.id < t2.id 
AND t1.fullName = t2.fullName 
AND t1.grade = t2.grade 
AND t1.section = t2.section;
